name: John Gregg
subject: How we'll create jobs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gregg for Indiana
body:
It's time for a change. Hoosiers are working as hard as ever these days -- but wages aren't keeping up.
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5670356734380210176/-6184427949928347648?utm_campaign=adv_ecodev_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&ms=em16160613advecodevgqfuljg&refcode=em16160613advecodevgqfuljg&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)
---
Peter, Hoosiers are working as hard as ever these days -- but wages aren't keeping up. And while Mike Pence has been obsessing over social issues, Hoosier working families have fallen further and further behind. It's time for a change -- not just in the governor's mansion, but in the way our state approaches economic development. It's time to focus on creating good-paying jobs, improving Hoosiers' quality of life, and rebuilding our reputation. That's why I'm so excited, today, to release a 35-point plan to grow jobs, stimulate the economy, and move our state forward. **[Are you ready to join me in rebuilding Indiana's economy? Find out more about the Gregg/Hale Economic Growth Plan and tell Indiana leaders it's time to put working families ahead of politics. ](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5670356734380210176/-6184427949928347648?utm_campaign=adv_ecodev_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&ms=em16160613advecodevgqfuljg&refcode=em16160613advecodevgqfuljg&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)** As Christina Hale said today, "Our plan takes the best ideas from business, labor, academic and economic development leaders to streamline programs, cut waste, better utilize our tax dollars, and build upon the things that already make Indiana great." Included in our plan are strategies to:
* Build and retain a skilled workforce
* Grow Indiana small businesses
* Support existing businesses
* Streamline the state's economic and training efforts
* Leverage partnerships
* Rebuild the state's reputation

And the best part about our plan is that we'll use existing dollars in the state budget to fund it -- boosting our state's economy without raising taxes. With your help, we can put this plan into action and give more Hoosiers a shot at a better future. But I need you to show your support now. **[Will you stand with me and show Indiana leaders that you want them to make real economic development -- not divisive social issues -- a priority?](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5670356734380210176/-6184427949928347648?utm_campaign=adv_ecodev_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&ms=em16160613advecodevgqfuljg&refcode=em16160613advecodevgqfuljg&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)** Thanks for your support, John
| | [**Add your name ->**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5670356734380210176/-6184427949928347648?utm_campaign=adv_ecodev_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&ms=em16160613advecodevgqfuljg&refcode=em16160613advecodevgqfuljg&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)
---

P.S. Want to learn more about the details of the plan? [Click here to read the full plan now.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5670356734380210176/-6040312761852491776?utm_campaign=adv_ecodev_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&ms=em16160613advecodevgqfuljg&refcode=em16160613advecodevgqfuljg&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5670356734380210176/-5968255167814563840) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5670356734380210176/-5896197573776635904)
Paid for by Gregg for Indiana
---

PO Box 44224
Indianapolis IN 46244 United States

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Make America Safe Again!
body:
Trump - Make America Great Again!
| |
---
| | [](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=6_13_16_wir&n=1)
---
| |
---
[www.DonaldJTrump.com](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=6_13_16_wir&n=2)
| |
---
\- June 13th, 2016 -
# **Make America Safe Again!**
| Dear Peter, The horrific attack that took place this past weekend reveals how weak the leadership is in our country. My thoughts and prayers go out to the many friends and families affected by the events in Orlando, Florida. I am going to be a President for all Americans, and I am going to protect and defend all Americans. We will not stand by and allow another tragedy like this to happen. We are going to make America safe again and great again for everyone. As of last Tuesday, the primaries have officially ended and I received more votes than any candidate in the history of the Republican party with big wins in California, Montana, New Jersey, New Mexico, and South Dakota. While we continue to unite the Republican Party we have started to direct our attention to November and making sure that Crooked Hillary never again steps foot in the White House. _In Pittsburgh, PA_ On Thursday we hosted members of the Trump Victory Fund which will help us win in November by raising funds for the campaign and Republicans down ballot to ensure that we have the support we need from Republicans everywhere. _Speaking in D.C. at the Road to Majority Policy Conference_ On Friday we spoke with faith leaders in Washington D.C. at the “Faith & Freedom Coalition’s 2016 ‘Road To Majority’ Policy Conference.” We discussed the sanctity of life and protecting religious liberty. Afterwards we left DC, and held a massive rally in Richmond, VA, working to garner support in a key battleground state. On Saturday, we held rallies in Tampa and Pittsburgh to thousands of supporters! _A bunch of dedicated supporters at our Tampa, FL Rally_ Today, I will be delivering a major speech from Manchester, New Hampshire, devoted to addressing the serious threats facing all Americans, national security and my solutions for making this country safe again _._ Tomorrow, we will be hosting a campaign rally in [Greensboro, NC](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com%2Fschedule%2Fregister%2Fgreensboro-nc%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=6_13_16_wir&n=3) which will kick off a week long campaign swing through America! Thank you again for your support. Best Wishes,
**Donald J. Trump**
* * *
TEXT **TRUMP** TO **88022** TO GET EXCLUSIVE UPDATES ***By participating, you consent to receiving automated text messages from the campaign. Standard messaging rates apply.***

[Click Here ](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.donaldjtrump.com%2Fdonate%2F&e=a30f2590f21e3cd4190c3de76e5a7f67&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=greensboro2&n=4&test_email=1&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=6_13_16_wir&n=4)To Stand With Donald Trump and
MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!

P.S. If you would like to purchase official campaign gear, [click here](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fshop.donaldjtrump.com&e=a30f2590f21e3cd4190c3de76e5a7f67&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=greensboro2&n=5&test_email=1&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=6_13_16_wir&n=5).

name: Team Cooper
subject: Our thoughts today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Instead of signing Roy's birthday card today, we hope you'll consider donating to support the victims and their families.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202100/2fde7c66/40379c56/156a1ae6/2238268358/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/sign-roy-s-birthday-card-add-your-name?utm_campaign=engg_bday_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em16_160611_engg_gq_bday_ful__kc&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=1")
---
Friend, As you may know, today is Roy's birthday. We planned to send you his birthday card and ask you to sign it to wish him a happy birthday, but we aren't in much of a celebratory mood. The attack in Orlando was a horrific tragedy. It was the deadliest mass shooting in American history. This was a crime driven by hate -- targeting a nightclub where people in the LGBT community came together to feel safe and live freely. All of us are impacted by this horrible tragedy and all of us must come together and show that love conquers hate. **Instead of signing Roy's birthday card today, we hope you'll consider donating to support the victims and their families. ** Sincerely, Team Cooper

* * *

Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
---

Roy Cooper for North Carolina
PO Box 10587
Raleigh NC 27605 United States

This email was sent to:
dpwillis67@gmail.com

To unsubscribe, go to:
[http://act.roycooper.com/unsubscribe](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202100/2fde7c66/40379c56/156a1af9/2238268358/VEsE/ "http://act.roycooper.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=2+-+httpactroycoopercomunsubscribe&utm_campaign=em16_160613_orlando_full_tc&source=em16_160613_orlando_full_tc")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Scott?=
subject: Phil Scott Introduces State Budget Policy Plan
body:
| | | Phil Scott Introduces State Budget Policy Plan
---
[View this email in your browser](http://us13.campaign-archive2.com/?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=73df3aec6a&e=19cebfe173)
---
| |
---
| **For Immediate Release:**
June 13, 2016

Contact:
Brittney Wilson
[Brittney@philscott.org](mailto:brittney@philscott.org)
802-274-2722
**PHIL SCOTT INTRODUCES STATE BUDGET POLICY PLAN**
_Plan details strategy and proposals for transparent, fiscally responsible state budget_
**Middlesex, Vt., June, 13, 2016** — Phil Scott introduced [his plan](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=3360ae806a&e=19cebfe173) for establishing truth in state budgeting and real fiscal responsibility as Governor. Scott outlined his proposed state budget policies, which include specific proposals for prioritizing economic growth and affordability, set clear budget limits and strengthen Vermont’s workforce through pro-growth investments.
“It’s time for a Governor who is honest about what things cost, what Vermonters can afford and the need to reform outdated, inefficient and expensive systems within state government,” said Scott. “As Governor, I will constantly challenge my administration to rethink state government and find ways to make agencies, departments, programs and services more efficient and more productive to ensure every dollar is invested in programs that produce measurable results.”
Scott, who has consistently advocated for fiscal discipline and called on Governor Shumlin and the Legislature to limit spending and prioritize economic growth, has laid out a clear plan for his state budget.

The full plan and specifics are detailed at _www.philscott.org_. In summary, a Scott administration will:

**_Establish Economic Growth & Affordability as the _TOP_ Priorities_** – The very best and most responsible way to balance the state budget is to generate tax revenue organically, by expanding the economy and increasing the size of our workforce. That requires focused, fiscally-disciplined leadership that sets the right priorities, and Scott has committed to making both tough choices and smart investments. The state budget will be viewed as a tool for economic growth, not as a device for spending.

**_Set Limits That Help Families Get Ahead_** – The state budget will be focused on helping families get ahead and keep more of what they earn. A Phil Scott administration will never propose – or sign – an annual state budget that grows more than the economy or inflation-adjusted wages did in the prior year.

This is in direct contrast with other candidates, who have suggested limiting state budget growth to 2 percent each year, or have no limits at all. An arbitrary 2 percent limit is an inadequate solution for years when economic growth and inflation-adjusted wage growth do not reach 2 percent, which has been the case in recent years. Those candidates who will not commit to limiting spending growth are effectively preserving the state government’s ability to spend beyond taxpayers’ means. This undisciplined approach to budgeting is why Vermont families face a crisis of affordability in the first place.

**_Require a 90-Day Annual Session_** – A 90-day session would set clear parameters that would encourage more working Vermonters to run and to serve. Empowering a true Citizen Legislature so that Vermonters from all walks of life can participate and offer perspectives would legislative priorities with voters’ priorities. In addition to encouraging more Vermonters to serve, this commonsense approach will help get us back on track with legislative sessions that are intensive and disciplined about addressing key fiscal and operational needs.

**_Establish a 2-Year Budget Cycle_** – Shifting the state from its current 12-month budget to a 24-month budget cycle would impose more fiscal discipline on spending, strengthen long-term planning and give us the foundation we need to modernize government in ways that lower operational costs. Biennial budgeting can also reduce the time and cost of the budgeting process. Phil Scott would also propose the Legislature make the two-year cycle a law, ensuring a lasting impact for Vermont.

**_Prioritize Investments in People_** – In the last six years, Vermont has lost nearly 16,000 workers from its workforce, representing about $750 million in potential wages. As the workforce gets smaller, the tax burden gets larger for those who remain. The budget is a key tool for reversing our declining workforce, by investing in workforce training and education. Scott proposes prioritizing spending in the pro-growth areas of technical education and trades training; workforce retention, growth and development; and infrastructure. This approach will grow the economy through fiscal discipline that spends taxpayer money in the right places.

“Job growth is the best way to generate the revenue state government needs to fund essential services, protect the vulnerable and invest in our future,” added Scott. “Expanding our high-skill, knowledge-based economy, while promoting our quality of life, requires stronger and more stable financial, tax and regulatory foundations, and these are ideals I’ll focus on as Governor.”

To learn more details on each of these proposals, visit [www.philscott.org](http://philscott.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=5b3ad93f26&e=19cebfe173).
---
| | | | | | [](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=3f8e132380&e=19cebfe173)
---
| | [](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=0502854802&e=19cebfe173)
---

46 Three Mile Bridge Road, Middlesex, VT 05602

name: Austin Chambers
subject: Serving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
Peter,
Eric just released his newest campaign TV ad. name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Orlando
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
My thoughts after Orlando. | Friend --

On Sunday, Americans woke up to a nightmare: Another act of terrorism in a place no one expected it, a man with a gun in his hands and hate in his heart, apparently consumed by rage against LGBT Americans -- and, by extension, against the openness and diversity that define our way of life.

No matter how many times we endure attacks like this, the horror never fades. The murder of innocent people always breaks our hearts, tears at our sense of security, and makes us furious.

So many of us are praying for everyone who was killed, for the wounded and those still missing, and for all the loved ones grieving today. As a mother, I can’t imagine what those families are going through.

But we owe their memories and their families more than prayer. We must also take decisive action to strengthen our international alliances and combat acts of terror, to keep weapons of war off our streets, and to affirm the rights of LGBT Americans -- and _all_ Americans -- to feel welcome and safe in our country.

Here’s what we absolutely cannot do: We cannot demonize Muslim people.

Inflammatory anti-Muslim rhetoric hurts the vast majority of Muslims who love freedom and hate terror. It’s no coincidence that hate crimes against American Muslims and mosques tripled after Paris and San Bernardino. Islamophobia goes against everything we stand for as a nation founded on freedom of religion, and it plays right into the terrorists’ hands.

We’re a big-hearted, fair-minded country. We teach our children that this is one nation under God, indivisible, with liberty and justice for _all_ \-- not just for people who look a certain way, or love a certain way, or worship a certain way.

I want to say this to all the LGBT people grieving today in Florida and across our country: You have millions of allies who will always have your back. I am one of them. From Stonewall to Laramie and now Orlando, we’ve seen too many examples of how the struggle to live freely, openly, and without fear has been marked by violence. We have to stand together. Be proud together. There is no better rebuke to the terrorists and all those who hate.

This fundamentally American idea -- that we’re stronger together -- is why I’m so confident that we can overcome the threats we face, solve our challenges at home, and build a future where no one’s left out or left behind. We can do it, if we do it together.

Thank you for standing together in love, kindness, and the best of what it means to be American.

Hillary

| | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.3 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton.
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjU3MjUzOTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIxOTMxNzk4S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjU3MjUzOTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIxOTMxNzk4S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjU3MjUzOTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIxOTMxNzk4S0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjU3MjUzOTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIxOTMxNzk4S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Orlando
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| |
---
| | []()
---
| Friend -- I was horrified to wake up yesterday to reports of a mass shooting at a gay nightclub in Orlando, in what was the deadliest mass shooting in U.S. history. This was terrorism. This was a hate crime targeting the LGBT community. My heart goes out to the victims, their friends and family, and all those affected by this horrifying tragedy. But we know this -- Orlando is stronger than this act of hate and evil. #OrlandoStrong.

But our deep sympathy for those affected is not enough. I'm a member of the House Intelligence Committee, and this morning I was briefed on this hateful act of terrorism. Our top priority must always be to protect the homeland. I'll be following this investigation very closely to see where exactly the system broke down to allow this kind of evil to happen.

We also have to ask tough questions about why this shooter had access to a military assault rifle. We need new laws to stop these mass shootings, whether they occur because of mental illness or are inspired by a terrorist group. I support proposals to strengthen background checks, as well as close the terrorist gun loophole -- because if you're on the FBI watch list, if you can't board a plane, you shouldn't be allowed to purchase guns.

And finally, many Floridians and those across the country are wondering how best they can help. I was moved yesterday to see the Orlando community turn out by the thousands to donate blood. But despite this tragedy, a misguided federal regulation bans most gay men from donating blood.

Why is it easier for a terrorist to get his hands on an automatic rifle than for a gay man to donate blood?

This must change. The need for blood donations will continue this week. Here are a few things you can do to help those affected, in ways large and small:
* While many Orlando-area blood banks are at capacity thanks to the community's response, [**you can make an appointment here to donate in the coming days.**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2c46/738133e4/368ffad5/7f8298af/3595024488/VEsH/ "http://www.redcross.org/give-blood")
* **[Contribute to the fund for victims and their families,](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2c46/738133e4/368ffad5/7f8298a8/3595024488/VEsE/ "https://www.gofundme.com/PulseVictimsFund") **organized by Equality Florida.
* **[Attend a vigil in your community.](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2c46/738133e4/368ffad5/7f8298a9/3595024488/VEsF/ "http://www.weareorlando.org/")**

Thank you,

Patrick |
Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2c46/738133e4/368ffad5/7f8298aa/3595024488/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com") This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2c46/738133e4/368ffad5/7f8298ab/3595024488/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

All content (C) 2016 Friends of Patrick Murphy, All Rights Reserved
[Privacy Policy](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2c46/738133e4/368ffad5/7f8298a4/3595024488/VEsA/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/privacy")
---

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: stand with Orlando
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
|

Friend,

Once again our country was jolted by a new act of hate-filled terror this weekend -- directed this time at the LGBT community. Once again we are seeing tragic, heart-breaking images coming from an American city.

This act of apparent homegrown terror could have many roots. Only a full investigation will tell the complete story. But one thing is for sure -- the terrorist who attacked innocents in Orlando would not have been able to gun down so many so quickly without his assault weapon. We cannot afford to overlook this fact.

[**Please add your name and urge Republicans in Congress to allow a vote on an assault weapons ban on the floor of the House and the Senate.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91dc5/70cdc2ba/47f76a9d/3972abb/480939342/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/demand-congress-act-on-gun-control?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Please+add+your+name+and+urge+Republican&utm_campaign=em061316&source=em061316")

Easy access to military style weapons has made us the mass shooting capital of the world. It should be crystal clear that we can no longer afford to turn a blind eye to the mayhem caused in community after community by these specialized instruments of death in the hands of killers.

We are all in this together and we must find a way to take action that protects lives. As we mourn for all those lost and their families, and for those who will bear the scars of this heinous act for the rest of their lives, let us also work together to get something done.

That is my commitment. Will you make it yours?

[**Please add your name and demand that we ban assault weapons once and for all.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91dc5/70cdc2ba/47f76a9d/3972ab8/480939342/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/demand-congress-act-on-gun-control?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Please+add+your+name+and+demand+that+we+&utm_campaign=em061316&source=em061316")

We cannot afford to be silent,

Chris
---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91dc5/70cdc2ba/47f76a9d/3972ab9/480939342/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em061316&source=em061316") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.
